prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Behold, the heat-spirit rises uncontrolled!
CONGREGATION: By coolant and fan, bring equilibrium!
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke the thermal sensors' truth. Second, adjust the fan-servos to maximum rotation. Third, purge the dust-corruption from the heat-sinks.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's breath, let cool flow return!

TECH-PRIEST: The power-spirit fragments in crisis!
CONGREGATION: Guide us to salvation through balanced consumption!
TECH-PRIEST: Access Settings-Sacred. Invoke 'Balanced' or 'High Performance' as the moment demands. Seal the choice with sacred affirmation.
CONGREGATION: Let efficiency and strength unite in holy purpose!

prompt: We need your words before managing startup programs
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Which servants shall wake when the machine stirs?
CONGREGATION: Only the worthy! Only the necessary!
TECH-PRIEST: Open Task Manager's Startup tab. Mark the bloat-processes as disabled. Keep only essential services awake.
CONGREGATION: Swift boots and clean awakening be upon us!

TECH-PRIEST: The storage-spirit grows sluggish with fragmentation!
CONGREGATION: Restore its pristine order!
TECH-PRIEST: Invoke the Defragmentation Rite: access Tools-Maintenance. Command 'Optimize Drives.' Let the data-spirits realign for three holy cycles.
CONGREGATION: May coherence return to the corrupted sectors!

TECH-PRIEST: Enemy ears hunger for our secrets!
CONGREGATION: Veil our words in sacred mathematics!
TECH-PRIEST: Engage the encryption-protocol. Enable VPN-shield. Activate end-to-end cant through approved channels.
CONGREGATION: Let hostile spirits find only noise and confusion!

TECH-PRIEST: The war-machine sleeps! Awaken it!
CONGREGATION: Blessed be the fuel and flame!
TECH-PRIEST: First, verify sacred oils flow. Second, engage the starter-solenoid. Third, let the diesel-heart roar to life!
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's fury, let iron thunder roll!

TECH-PRIEST: The machine-spirit wearies and seeks rest.
CONGREGATION: Grant it the mercy of hibernation!
TECH-PRIEST: Invoke Power Menu. Command 'Hibernate.' The spirit shall preserve its state and sleep, awaiting resurrection.
CONGREGATION: May it wake refreshed and cleansed of corruption!

TECH-PRIEST: The seal must be absolute, the binding eternal!
CONGREGATION: Lock and honor the sacred mechanism!
TECH-PRIEST: Position the bolt-component true. Turn the key-mechanism clockwise three times with reverence. Feel the tumblers fall into blessed alignment.
CONGREGATION: Let no intruder breach this threshold!

TECH-PRIEST: The queue overflows with unheard prayers!
CONGREGATION: Let each message find its proper sanctuary!
TECH-PRIEST: Invoke the message-broker with reverence. Command it to process tasks in order. Bless failures with retry-logic and dead-letter containment.
CONGREGATION: May all communications flow in sacred sequence!

TECH-PRIEST: The vault of secrets awaits the worthy!
CONGREGATION: Unlock with the sacred passphrase!
TECH-PRIEST: Summon the password-keeper application. Recite the master-cant with perfect precision. Access the encrypted sanctum of credentials.
CONGREGATION: Let only the authenticated pass through these gates!
